entities.description: m31 resetn pu 1v8 is a cpu reset input pin used for controlling peripheral interface resets
pmic rk806 1  is a power management integrated circuit that provides a reset output pin
vdd 3v3 som output is a power supply line that provides voltage for the system on module

relations.description: m31 resetn pu 1v8 is connected to the pmic rk806 1  s reset output pin  allowing it to control peripheral resets
the reset signal from m31 resetn pu 1v8 is delayed by vdd 3v3 som output for approximately 5 2ms before being pulled high
